nodes.name: 约翰·弗里德里希·格梅林
nodes.summary: 约翰·弗里德里希·格梅林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联64种鸟类，包括灰穴䳍、杂色穴䳍、葡萄胸鴨等64种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 橙翅斑腹雀
nodes.summary: 橙翅斑腹雀（Orange-winged pytilia，学名 Pytilia afra），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于约翰·弗里德里希·格梅林，常见栖息地包括稀树草原。
locations: 约翰·弗里德里希·格梅林

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 稀树草原
nodes.summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

links.evidence: thumb|Orange-winged Pytilia The orange-winged pytilia (Pytilia afra), also known as the golden-backed pytilia, is a species of estrildid finch found in Africa

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: This pytilia is found in Angola, Botswana, Burundi, the Republic of Congo, the Democratic Republic of the Congo, Ethiopia, Kenya, Malawi, Mozambique, Rwanda, South Africa, South Sudan, Tanzania, Uganda, Zambia and Zimbabwe. It has an estimated global extent of occurrence of . Its habitat is edges of forests, miombo woodland and wooded grasslands, usually in moist areas. It is found at elevations up to above sea level
